'''Tinnin Droo''' was a [[Newcomer]] living on [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]] as of [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]] where he owned a machine shop which included a smelter. He and his assistant, [[Nap Socker]], were severely burned when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who had come to investigate the disappearance of [[Callista Ming]], used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], accidentally causing a massive [[Force storm (weather)|Force Storm]] that overturned the smelter.
